height_limit_ft.field_value_text: building heights shall under no circumstances exceed 12 stories or 125 feet

height_limit_ft.reasoning: The text specifies a maximum building height of 125 feet for multifamily dwellings in the RA8-18 district under specific conditions, which is the most permissive height found.

parking_min_spaces_per_unit.field_value_text: Multiple-family dwelling: One off-street space per dwelling unit.

density_limit_units_per_acre.reasoning: The value 3,500 sqft/unit is the lowest minimum lot area per dwelling unit explicitly stated for a multifamily district (RA8-18), representing the highest density.

setback_front_ft.field_value_text: 25 feet from any street right-of-way line
